title: INTERNAL Error: Attempted to access index 0 within vector of size 0
description:
### What happens?

The below test case caused an internal error.

### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE  t1(c1 INT );

SELECT * FROM t1 ORDER BY LIST_ZIP(FALSE);

-- INTERNAL Error:
-- Attempted to access index 0 within vector of size 0
```

### OS:

Ubuntu 22.04

### DuckDB Version:

v1.1.4-dev2283 44c3e83b29

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

### Affiliation:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR, c3 FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE t3(c1 INT PRIMARY KEY, c2 BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE);
SELECT * FROM t2 ORDER BY c3 DESC;
SELECT * FROM t3 ORDER BY CASE WHEN c2 IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, c2;
key_bug_features: SELECT with ORDER BY on empty table
